message:
fix: prevent integer overflow in line_number index-to-usize conversions

Replace unsafe `(i + 1) as usize` casts with `usize::try_from(i).ok()`
followed by `saturating_add(1)`. The old pattern could produce garbage
values for negative i64 inputs (wrapping to usize::MAX) or panic on
i64::MAX/u64::MAX overflow in debug builds. Fixed at all four call sites
in query.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
